action.reasoning: Observation: CPU training completed, best val MSE 1.388 (scaled). Epoch time ~7.4 min, total 37 min for 5 epochs. CUDA kernel error prevented GPU use earlier. Analysis: Need baseline test MSE first. GPU essential but LSTM cuDNN incompatible; simpler models may work on GPU. Time is very limited (0.248h remaining). Decision: Submit eval with current checkpoint to establish baseline score; then attempt GPU training with fast architecture (linear/transformer) in remaining time.
